pickModel.name: rookie_proxy_2026_then_tiered_future
pickModel.notes: 2026 slots map 1:1 to top-72 rookie composites (years_exp==0 + must-have list, minimum one source hit); 2027/2028 use tier model with outside-market blend and calibrated future discount.

formula.fitShrinkage: r_shrunk = shrink(raw_ratio -> archetype_prior + neutral, weighted by sample/role/projection)
formula.fitCap: multiplier from bounded log transform: m_score = exp(alpha * clamp(log(r_shrunk), lo, hi))
